name: the-miracle-of-mindfulness
description: Thich Nhat Hanh's The Miracle of Mindfulness — learn the practice of mindfulness meditation through conscious breathing, daily presence, and transforming suffering into peace
useCase: Helps anyone start or deepen their mindfulness practice — from beginners who can't stop their thoughts to experienced meditators looking for daily practice guidance.
knownRisks: Mindfulness practice is simple but not easy — results come from consistent practice
